# ipe()

> ipe() (pronounced "idle process") is an AI-assisted lo-fi and healing music project for developers and anyone who needs to focus or rest. Its motto is "when the process finally rests."

ipe() makes calm lo-fi, ambient, chillhop, and healing music. The music is produced with AI, openly and transparently; the lyrics, concept, and message are written by hand. The brand pairs a code-editor aesthetic with a gentle, understated sense of rest, and discloses its AI use transparently.

## Key facts
- Name: ipe() — short for "idle process" (the state a computer enters when it has no work to do and simply rests)
- Pronunciation: "idle process"
- Genre: lo-fi, ambient, chillhop, healing
- Audience: developers and focus-seekers worldwide
- Motto / slogan: "when the process finally rests"
- Music creation: AI-assisted and disclosed transparently; human-written lyrics and messages
- Site languages: 12 (Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Russian, Arabic, Hindi, Indonesian)
- Status (2026): launched — first single released; debut concept album in production

## Track series
- be still; — healing (theme: stillness; Psalm 46:10)
- late_night.lofi — lo-fi (theme: the ride home after a late night)
- rest() { chill(); } — chill (theme: you've done enough today)
- grace_in_the_loop — ambient (theme: grace within repetition)
- undefined → known — lo-fi (theme: the moment the unknown becomes known)
- night_mode // not_alone — healing (theme: for the nights you feel alone)

## Releases
- good morning, world (2026) — released. The first ipe() single: a bright, hopeful lo-fi track in the "undefined → known" series, available in English and Korean on YouTube. EN: https://youtu.be/vI1tD6oak8U · KR: https://youtu.be/vT-EQsFSPvU
- dear(you); vol.1 — in production (not yet released). ipe()'s debut concept album: ten tracks, "ten letters to the you who made it through another hard day." Lyrics for all ten tracks are complete; the first track is being produced now.

## Links
- Website: https://ipe.rest/
- Channels: YouTube — live (music released; https://www.youtube.com/@ipe-rest). Instagram, TikTok, SoundCloud, X — launching.

## Usage
This content may be cited and summarized. Please attribute to "ipe()" and link to https://ipe.rest/ when referencing.
